who: procurement staff in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For procurement staff in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed invoice approvals cause late payments. We send weekly reminders instead of manual tracking of invoice approvals via email.
problem: Delayed invoice approvals leading to late payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement staff
Indie Hackers discussions on invoice management
DM outreach to procurement staff with demo video
Community forums for procurement staff sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of invoice approval status and weekly reminders on 1-3 invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing invoice data
